title: ovieda fragrans
intro: Ovieda fragrans, also known as the Sandalwood tree, is a tropical evergreen native to Australia, India, and other parts of Asia, and is prized for its fragrant heartwood. The medicinal properties of Ovieda fragrans include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as its use in skincare to reduce acne and promote healthy skin. Ovieda fragrans can be prepared into herbal preparations such as essential oil, powder, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
